text_original: not adult enough..language is monitored..cannot mention certain things or scenarios..they'll reject your texts..then you have to proofread and find the words and remove them in order to post texts
text_zh: 不够成熟..语言受到监控..不能提及某些事物或场景..他们会拒绝你的文本..然后你得校对并找出那些词删掉才能发布
reply_original: Hi there, I'm sorry to hear about your frustration with the content restrictions. To comply with Google Play policies, we must filter certain content. If you encounter specific blocked phrases, please email us at support@fantachat.ai with screenshots so we can review and improve the system.
reply_zh: 你好，很抱歉听到你对内容限制感到沮丧。为了遵守谷歌商店的政策，我们必须过滤某些内容。如果你遇到特定的被屏蔽短语，请发送截图至support@fantachat.ai，以便我们审核并改进系统。
